tasks.title: Implement 'render-profiles list' and 'pipeline-js list' CLI commands
evidence: User request 'list' highlights a gap in visibility for key configuration files via the CLI.
docs/usage.md confirms that Render Profiles and Pipeline JS are configured via JSON but lack a CLI 'list' interface.
Existing management commands (auth, jobs, schedules) all provide 'list' functionality, making these omissions inconsistent.
plan: Add 'render-profiles' and 'pipeline-js' commands to the router in internal/cli/cli.go
Create internal/cli/manage/render_profiles.go with 'list' functionality leveraging internal/fetch/render_profiles_store.go
Create internal/cli/manage/pipeline_js.go with 'list' functionality leveraging internal/pipeline/js.go
Update the CLI help menu and documentation in docs/usage.md

tasks.title: Cache template registry in extraction pipeline to avoid repeated disk I/O
evidence: extract.Execute calls LoadTemplateRegistry on every invocation, reading extract_templates.json from disk
Large crawls will suffer performance degradation due to redundant file I/O
plan: Modify Execute to accept an optional TemplateRegistry
Implement a thread-safe singleton or cached registry in the Manager
Update jobs.run to pass the cached registry to the extraction logic

tasks.title: Implement browser health monitoring and recovery for PlaywrightFetcher
evidence: PlaywrightFetcher shares a single browser instance across all calls
If the browser process dies or hangs, all subsequent fetches will fail
plan: Add a health check to PlaywrightFetcher before using the cached browser
Implement automatic recovery (re-initialization) if the browser is detected as unhealthy
Add circuit breaker or timeout to avoid blocking on a hung browser

tasks.title: Optimize health check by making Playwright availability check lighter
evidence: checkPlaywrightAvailability calls playwright.Run() on every health check
This is resource intensive and can slow down health monitoring
plan: Implement a lighter check for Playwright (e.g. checking for binary/driver presence only)
Cache the result of the playwright.Run() check with a TTL

tasks.title: Add API endpoints and CLI commands to manage (clear/delete) crawl states
evidence: There is no way to clear or delete specific crawl states via API or CLI
Users cannot easily reset incremental tracking for a specific URL
plan: Add DELETE /v1/crawl-states/{url} and DELETE /v1/crawl-states (bulk) endpoints
Implement 'spartan crawl-states delete' command
Update OpenAPI spec to include new management endpoints

tasks.title: Conduct E2E test robustness audit and fix potential flakiness
evidence: AGENTS.md mentions retry logic for flaky E2E tests, suggesting known instability
No explicit timeout or resource cleanup verification in current E2E test files
plan: Audit internal/e2e tests for common flakiness patterns (race conditions, timing dependencies)
Improve cleanup of test artifacts and browser processes after E2E runs

tasks.title: Enhance CrawlState with metadata (depth, source job ID) for better tracking
evidence: CrawlState currently only tracks ETag, LastModified, Hash, and LastScraped
Missing context about which job last updated the state or at what depth it was found
plan: Update model.CrawlState and DB schema to include metadata fields (jobID, depth)
Update Store.UpsertCrawlState to persist the new fields
Update crawl logic to pass metadata when saving state

tasks.title: Remove redundant secret redaction in API utility functions
evidence: writeError calls SafeMessage(err) which redacts secrets
writeJSONError (called by writeError) also calls RedactString(message), performing double redaction
plan: Refactor writeJSONError to take a pre-redacted message or move redaction to a single entry point
Ensure consistent application of redaction without unnecessary overhead

tasks.title: Update Makefile clean target to include openapi-ts error logs
evidence: web/ folder contains numerous openapi-ts-error-*.log files
make clean does not currently remove these files
plan: Add 'rm -f web/openapi-ts-error-*.log' to the clean target in Makefile

tasks.title: Ensure consistent version reporting across CLI binary, help, and API
evidence: Version info is defined in openapi.yaml and buildinfo, but not explicitly verified for consistency
CLI help menu doesn't show the dynamic build version
plan: Update CLI help template to include version from buildinfo
Add a test to ensure openapi.yaml version matches internal version
